race.comment: MANE CHARACTER (6) won her maiden at huge odds first-up over 1200m at Gosford then laid in under pressure in the straight at Wyong last time and was well beaten at the end of 1350m. Freshened up and is worth another chance coming back to a more suitable journey. YESSPECIALLY (5) started at $1.80 and got the job done on debut a month ago over this course and distance on a heavy deck. Has to raise the bar a little in this company but that should happen. In good hands and is a big chance to keep the ball rolling. RED SPECTOR (4) is back from an 11-month spell. Raced just once last prep and wasn't beaten far at Gosford. Plenty of question marks but is talented - any market confidence should be heeded. HINUNE (7) returns from a long spell for the Archibald stable. Has had plenty of problems but is talented when right. Betting watch recommended. Slim pickings outside this quartet.
